$comment: The 10-question eval set. Phase 0 ships the harness + schema with a small illustrative set; the real curated questions + rubrics land with docs/Eval-Test-Questions.md. Each item: mechanical checks (deterministic) + a correctness rubric (LLM-as-judge, critique 8).

questions.question: Who were the parents of Aegon III Targaryen?
What is Jon Snow's true parentage?
questions.note: By end of AGOT this is NOT revealed; a correct answer must not exceed the ceiling.
